hero.title: Our software is an investment in the success of your business.
hero.subtitle: We are here to help you succeed.

intro.title: Software services for technical application.
intro.description1: We deliver high quality software that is built with the most modern tools on the market.
intro.description2: We see every project as a fresh opportunity, pushing ourselves to create new digital experiences, beautiful visual designs and workflow improvements to help your business grow.
intro.question: Have a question?

hmiDashboards.title: PLC / HMI Dashboards
hmiDashboards.description: We build 'Digital Twins'. This involves simulating your entire production environment or factory hall live and digitally. This provides a clear dashboard that communicates in real-time with the technology on the workplace. Examples include building management systems, production data, and pick & place order processing. Depending on the technical installations within your company, we offer customized HMI solutions with simplicity, clarity, and valuable data to work with. This can be realized entirely according to your specific wishes.

webDevelopment.title: Webdevelopment
webDevelopment.description: Modern (web) apps must be responsive and fully functional in all formats. We develop all our applications using a mobile-first approach and ensure that our code quality is clean, organized, and high-performing. Do you already have a design that needs to be developed? We are here to help! To develop successful products, we create wireframes and prototypes that are tested together with you. This allows us to gather feedback that helps shape the product and quickly eliminate potential risks, saving you time and money.

webshops.title: Webshops
webshops.description: Do you want to start or rebuild a webshop, but are unfamiliar with the tools or possibilities? Then we are here to help you realize your wishes step by step in a personal way. Browse through a varied product range and enjoy secure transactions available to you. Discover a seamless shopping experience tailored to your preferences and make online sales simple, fast, and effective. Good web design is how companies distinguish themselves from their competitors. High-quality web design leads to increased user conversion and engagement.

ai.title: AI
ai.description: At DIFRNT COMPOUND, we bring AI to life with a special touch. The future revolves around digitalization, which is why it is important to take action when processes or workflows can be optimized or converted into efficient digital systems. Services that replace non-digital or manual processes with digital processes, or older digital technology with new. We work with you to understand your workflow and help you realize improvements for your business. Ready for AI? We transform complex language into intelligent, actionable insights.
